name: How long do I have to file after a machine accident at work?
description: Report immediately; filing 1-3 years but notify employer within days[1][2].

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file after a machine accident at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately; filing 1-3 years but notify employer within days[1][2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Typically 1-3 years depending on state, but report injury within days.** Utah has no strict filing deadline but prompt notice (within 180 days) is key; Idaho similar for comp claims[1][2]. Third-party suits: 2-4 years. **Key factors:** Delays risk denial; medical reports start clock. **Practical guidance:** Report same day, file formally soon after. Check state rules—Utah workers report ASAP[4]. Attorney ensures deadlines met.
